mapper.sql: SELECT p.id, p.hospital_id, p.supplier_id, p.forbid_submit_flag, p.forbid_bind_flag, p.del_flag, p.create_by, p.create_time, p.update_by, p.update_time, p.remark, h.hospital_name, s.company_name AS supplier_company_name FROM scm_hospital_supplier_permission p LEFT JOIN scm_hospital h ON p.hospital_id = h.hospital_id LEFT JOIN scm_supplier s ON p.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
mapper.select: SELECT hospital_id FROM scm_hospital_supplier_permission WHERE supplier_id = #{supplierId} AND forbid_submit_flag = '1' AND (del_flag = '0' OR del_flag IS NULL)
